case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. CLEVELAND DENTAL, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-09-2014 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-01-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-21-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-01-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT CLEVELAND DENTAL, INC. OLIVER, KIMBERLY G. OLIVER, STEVEN D DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-09-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-06-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-17-2014
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
